item.title: Smol dump of quietly qualitative amazing video memes
item.description:
Nice Trick ...
2 : Someone in Chile has invented bicycles with a built-in anti-theft system
perfect circle
4 : Making a Rug using a tufting Gun
Dude shows off his invisibility shield
6 : Some cows in Ireland swimming over to an island to graze.
just like cards
8 : color matching paint
A Parking Job. Backing an 18 wheeler in a tight spot.
10 : Perfectly timed shot
When two become one ....
12 : Mold casting an enclosed ceramic dish
Victor Navlet painted this masterpiece in 1855 from memory after flying over Paris in a balloon. Enjoy ! No one dies in this post and no animals were harmed.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Everyone was harmed during the making of this post.
item.description:
I keep watching this video and I still can't figure out when exactly it appears.
"What is this farmer doing?"
"Goddamnit. Stupid cunt."
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: Good for her. There’s ways to go, but drops of water make the ocean
item.dc:creator: wadatahmydamie

item.title: Tomorrow, Thailand embraces marriage equality
item.description:
BANGKOK (AP) — It’s a big week for LGBTQ+ couples in Thailand. On Thursday, they will be able to legally register their marriages, making it only the third place in Asia, after Taiwan and Nepal, where they have such a right. A grand celebration is planned in central Bangkok to facilitate hundreds of same-sex couples who plan to register their marriages on the very first day. Source: https://apnews.com/article/thailand-marriage-equality-law-couples-photos-0bbc6b4771a16efeefbe7397eb6a4dd0
Congratulations to our LGBTQIA+ Thai homies! This is only first step of many, but it proves something important: In 2025, even good things can happen.
item.dc:creator: ruint

item.title: There is no one who is sufficiently pure for fascists.
item.description:
Just grabbed this off Tumblr but the message needs to be spread far and wide. Even if you think that your blonde-haired blue-eyed heterosexual cisgender ass is safe, eventually you will have an ideological difference with a fascist and they will declared that you need to be tossed in the camps with the other "degenerates" and "undesirables".
Yeah.
item.dc:creator: AndyTheAbsurd

item.title: For Christians who try to live as Christ told us to live, Lord, we give you thanks.
item.description: "When a foreigner resides among you in your land, do not mistreat them. The foreigner residing among you must be treated as your native-born. Love them as yourself, for you were foreigners in Egypt. I am the LORD your God." - Leviticus 19:33-34.

item.title: Hating Nazis is something of a family tradition
item.description: A picture of my grandpa taken at the Berghof(Hitlers personal residence in Bavaria) at some point in April 1945. He never spoke about the war much, but according to one of the men he served with "he killed a lot of Nazis".
item.dc:creator: wolfenstien98

item.title: What a relief.
item.description: I know what you're thinking. Yes, that's Daniel Tosh.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Serene night in the fields
item.description: It was my shift in the fox hide last night. A slight breeze with light snow in the air gave me quite the mesmerising view. Almost forgot to scan for foxes because I was too busy enjoying the snow drifts. Edit; As someone pointed out, I'll get down voted to oblivion for this. That's OK, we're used to it. Many people have strong feelings regarding killing animals. That's OK, I see where you're coming from. I'll take the time to explain anyway, maybe I can spread some knowledge. We have a fox problem in Norway. Humans leave waste everywhere. Garbage and such. The fox is a scavenger, just like the racoon. It comes into populated areas, finds more food than it would in nature, and multiplies much faster than it would naturally without humans. The fox is also a predator. It hunts everything from roe deer to pigeons. In recent years we've seen a steep decline in the population of roe deer, hares, common pigeons, grouse, western capercaille and a few other species. Basically, what's happening is that humans have turbocharged the fox's means of survival, and that has in turn created a threat to huge parts of the general wildlife in Norwegian nature. Because of this, wildlife experts have recommended that the fox population needs to be culled, so that they reach a sustainable number of individuals. Basically, the government has ordered us to do this to save wildlife. If we don't, we're risking the extinction of many other animals that also have the right to exist in our forests. The fox is also spreading Trichinosis, which is a often a deadly disease with no cure. So that's why we run shifts in the fox hide. We're trying to save many animal lives. Unfortunately, the only way to do it is to take some lives. I know this isn't going to change everyone's mind, but maybe some of you learned something about the preservation of wildlife and the consequences of humans and our destructive way of living. Edit 2; I'm so happy to see that so many people are willing to stop, understand, and accept why we're doing this. We're used to people not accepting the work we put in and refusing to listen to why we're doing it, so this was nice. Thank you all. I hope we can get to a point where the fox, majestic as it is, can return to it's natural state and live in harmony with the rest of our wildlife. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: ipscfuntime3

item.title: Images of Note: I am reborn!
item.description:
I have never had pizza rolls. I don't think they do them here.
Now I wanna go to Aldi for root beer.
A genuinely horrifying realisation when you have it
Look at this cozy little shit!
All hail the kittybots
yeah
Horse
Seeing these guys on the road is a treat
Linux truly is the Ultrakill of Operating Systems
Fueling health inequalities is the plan.
I'm motr impressed that they got the transparency right.
HELL YEAH
Donald Trump makes Mycology illegal
hell yeah little buddy
c r u n c h y
Don't listen to them Torres Strait Islands.
Bridget!
They can't update these missing kids posters in arcades. One of those kids was found safe (something to do with a custody battle).
Dominance
yes, yes it is.
The people who think food isn't a human right believe civilisation exists to control others and make them money.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips! It's time for Greggs
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I don't do reposts, but when I do it's because you need this info
item.description: https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Database_download You need this more today then you did two months ago when I posted it. Do it for yourself, your friends, your family. Even if it's just how to make bread.

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Rev. Mariann Edgar Budde. Grace and bravery personified. A Heroic, moving, historical sermon.
item.description: "Courage is not the absence of fear, but rather the assessment that something else is more important than fear." - Franklin D. Roosevelt. Sermon: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mI4h4zbkNMU She also spoke out against Trump in 2020 for holding a Bible outside St John's Church in Washington DC as a stunt to complain about BLM (a racial justice protest) movement in 2020 : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fm0CVQB6Zk0
item.dc:creator: naturepriestess
